text.title: voice-ui-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for voice-ui-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLM-generated prompts default to verbose, apologetic tone.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Explicitly bound max word count and ban filler phrases ("I'd be happy to", "Just to confirm") in the system prompt — the model will not self-edit reliably.

failure-mode.description: Generated SSML includes tags rejected by the target platform.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Validate every generated SSML fragment against the platform's supported-tag list before shipping; unsupported tags render as silent drops or literal text.

failure-mode.description: PII in transcripts sent to LLM for copy "improvement".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Redact sensitive slots before any LLM analysis call; build the sanitizer as a mandatory pipeline step, not an optional flag.
